Landing Clients

Funnel #4: The Game
What You'll Need
Clickfunnels (or other landing page provider)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Custom domain (optional)
Wuffoo (or Lastform/Jotform)
ScheduleOnce
Zapier
Wistia (if adding a video)
Step By Step
Step #1: Download (or create) funnel landing pages to your Click Funnels account
Step #2: Add Pixel & tracking to funnel
Add base pixel to every landing page
Add custom event ViewedGame to landing page (first step of funnel)
Add custom event ViewedGame2 to landing page containing embedded jotform (or quiz)
Add custom event ViewedGame3 to landing page containing case study/cta
Add custom event ViewedGameSchedule to landing page containing embedded calendar
Add custom event GameLead to landing page containing embedded form/wuffo form
--> IMPORTANT: once you have installed the custom events, trigger them by opening the landing pages in a new tab. Wait an hour. Then create custom conversions of each of these events.
Step #3: Create your jotform quiz - embed on landing page
Step #4: Embed your calendar - ensure that calendar redirects to landing page containing wuffoo form
Ensure SMS reminders (24hrs prior and 1hr prior) are enabled
Ensure you don't allow booking more than 4 days out
Ensure you have no more than 4 spaces available per day
Step #5: Embed your wufoo form - ensure form redirects to final landing page in funnel
Step #6: Create a zap using Zapier between your calendar and yur email/CRM. OPTIONAL: set up an automated email that asks them to fill out the form if they haven't already done so
Step #7: Set up ads
Create custom audience of those that triggered ViewedGame event in last 180 days (exclude them from your ads)
Create custom audience of those that triggered GameLead event in last 180 days (exclude them from your ads)
OPTIONAL: Retarget those that visited the lander but didn't book
Ad Example
